title: Test lesson
root_cause: Missing validation
prevention_rule: Add input checks

title: Mirror agent-context manifest updates across runtime and cached paths
root_cause: Agent-facing context fields can land in init output first while runtime scoping manifests or cached agent-context generators still omit them, leaving downstream consumers inconsistent.
prevention_rule: When adding a new agent-facing context field, update both src/lib/context.js and src/lib/codebase-intel.js in the same task and add scoped integration coverage for at least one live init path plus one cached-context path.

title: Make validate-commands raw output consumable inside executor shells
root_cause: The validator emits an @file indirection path whose target is not readable by a follow-up shell step, so executors cannot inspect pass/fail details after successful runs.
prevention_rule: For commands that emit @file indirection, provide a stable stdout/json mode or guarantee the referenced file remains readable for immediate subprocess inspection in the same shell.

title: Validate surfaced command excerpts instead of whole agent prompts
root_cause: The shared command-integrity validator scans slash-like substrings, so full agent/skill files produced false failures from config-path placeholders such as __OPENCODE_CONFIG__/bgsd-oc and non-guidance CLI snippets.
prevention_rule: When locking command guidance surfaces, feed the validator curated user-facing command excerpts (or pre-filtered guidance lines) while keeping exact-file assertions separate for full-file wording coverage.

title: execute:commit can fail on dirty trees during path-scoped plan commits
root_cause: The execute:commit helper rejects dirty worktrees even when the requested files are isolated, so phase-planning runs can fail to persist valid PLAN.md changes in active development workspaces.
prevention_rule: When commit_docs workflows are expected to commit only specific planning artifacts, either allow safe path-scoped commits on dirty trees or surface a built-in fallback recommendation before the helper aborts.

title: Plan-finalization helpers should accept current STATE and REQUIREMENTS formats
root_cause: verify:state complete-plan and plan:requirements mark-complete still expect older markdown shapes, so current STATE.md and backtick-form REQUIREMENTS entries were not parsed during execution.
prevention_rule: Keep state/requirements mutators aligned with the live markdown formats used by generated planning files and add regression tests covering current repo artifacts before relying on those helpers in execute-plan flows.

title: Requirement completion helper misses backticked IDs
root_cause: plan:requirements mark-complete still matches only bold checkbox IDs, but current REQUIREMENTS.md uses backticked IDs, so automated plan-finalization leaves completed requirements unchecked.
prevention_rule: Normalize requirement checkbox parsing for both bold and backticked ID formats before relying on mark-complete during executor finalization.

title: Requirements completion CLI misses backtick-wrapped IDs
root_cause: plan:requirements mark-complete matches raw tokens, but REQUIREMENTS.md stores canonical IDs inside backticks, so execution-state automation cannot mark completed requirements through the standard command.
prevention_rule: Normalize requirement IDs by stripping optional markdown backticks before lookup so execution workflows can complete traced requirements without manual file edits.

title: Verifier helper should fail structured, not crash
root_cause: The installed verify:verify artifacts helper can crash with an unhandled ReferenceError (writeDebugDiagnostic undefined), forcing manual artifact verification and weakening verifier workflow reliability.
prevention_rule: Add regression coverage for verifier helper startup paths and return structured error JSON when debug helpers are unavailable so verification can continue or fail loudly without a stack trace.

title: Verify requirement marker helpers against on-disk checklist state
root_cause: The plan:requirements mark-complete helper returned not_found for phase requirement IDs during plan completion, so metadata automation did not update REQUIREMENTS.md even though the workflow expected it to.
prevention_rule: After plan:requirements mark-complete, always read REQUIREMENTS.md and repair any still-unchecked plan requirement IDs before reporting success or creating the metadata commit.

title: Guard verifier helpers against missing debug logger dependencies
root_cause: The installed verify:verify artifacts path can throw ReferenceError: writeDebugDiagnostic is not defined while warming caches, which turns artifact verification into a tooling failure instead of a reportable result.
prevention_rule: Keep debug-diagnostic hooks optional in verifier/cache code paths and add a regression test that verify:verify artifacts returns structured status even when debug logging helpers are absent or disabled.

title: Plugin source tests need an explicit ESM loading path
root_cause: The local Node test runner treats src/plugin/*.js source files as non-importable CommonJS in this workspace, so new source-level plugin tests can fail before exercising behavior.
prevention_rule: When adding focused tests for new src/plugin modules, either exercise the built plugin bundle or copy the touched source files to temporary .mjs fixtures before importing them so RED/GREEN proofs reflect behavior instead of loader mismatches.

title: State completion helpers should tolerate legacy unbolded session fields
root_cause: verify:state complete-plan expected a narrower STATE.md field shape than the live repo used, so plan completion repair failed even though the needed Current Position data existed on disk.
prevention_rule: Make state-completion helpers parse both bolded and unbolded STATE.md field variants before refusing completion-path updates, then add regression coverage against live legacy formatting.

title: Invalidate parser caches before hook-driven state re-reads
root_cause: Hook-triggered refresh logic reused cached planning parser results after on-disk STATE.md changes, so lifecycle updates could publish stale sidebar metadata even when the sync helper was correct.
prevention_rule: When lifecycle hooks recompute UI or status from planning files after potential writes, invalidate parser caches for the repo before re-reading project state and rerun the focused proof against the rebuilt runtime.

title: Artifact verifier patterns should avoid comma-joined contains fields
root_cause: Plan artifact metadata used comma-joined  strings, but the artifact verifier treated each full string as one literal pattern and produced false stub-like failures despite implemented code and passing focused tests.
prevention_rule: Artifact-verification metadata should either support list semantics for multiple expected symbols or require one pattern per entry so verifier evidence matches real implementations without manual override.

title: Artifact verifier false-negatives on comma-separated contains metadata
root_cause: Plan artifact metadata can express multiple required markers in one comma-separated contains string, but verify:verify artifacts may treat that payload as one literal pattern and report missing sections even when the artifact clearly contains each marker.
prevention_rule: When artifact verification fails on contains metadata, inspect whether the plan encoded multiple expected markers as one comma-separated string; if so, cross-check the artifact directly and flag the helper result as a tooling warning instead of assuming the artifact is a stub.

title: Artifact verifier misreads comma-separated contains metadata
root_cause: verify:verify artifacts appears to treat comma-separated PLAN.md contains strings as a single literal pattern, so present headings/fields are reported missing during phase verification.
prevention_rule: When PLAN artifact metadata needs multiple required markers, encode them in a verifier-supported form or update the helper to split and test each marker independently before using contains results as evidence.

title: Summary verifier mistakes backticked commands for file references
root_cause: verify:summary extracts every backticked token that looks path-like, so TDD audit command examples in SUMMARY.md can be misclassified as missing files during self-check.
prevention_rule: Teach verify:summary to ignore command-form inline code blocks or validate only file-list sections before using it as a completion gate.

title: State completion helper can fail after successful execution
root_cause: The bundled verify:state complete-plan path references writeDebugDiagnostic, which is undefined at runtime, so plan-finalization can fail after task work is already complete.
prevention_rule: Add a post-build smoke test for verify:state complete-plan and document the executor fallback to granular state-update commands when the helper crashes.

title: Verification helpers should not depend on missing debug globals
root_cause: The bundled verification path can invoke cache warm-up code that calls writeDebugDiagnostic even when that helper is undefined in the runtime bundle, causing verify:key-links to crash before returning evidence.
prevention_rule: Add a bundled-runtime smoke check that exercises verify:key-links and other cache-warming verification commands, and guard optional debug hooks behind a defined-function check before calling them.

title: Verifier should treat helper-runtime crashes as tooling warnings and continue manual proof
root_cause: The bundled verifier helpers can crash on cache warm paths (for example when writeDebugDiagnostic is undefined), which blocks helper-only evidence collection even when the underlying artifacts are verifiable from source and focused tests.
prevention_rule: When verify helpers crash, record the helper failure as a tooling warning and immediately switch to manual artifact/key-link checks plus focused tests instead of treating the crash as the only source of truth.

title: verify:state complete-plan should dedupe rerun entries
root_cause: The execute flow can legitimately rerun verify:state complete-plan after SUMMARY creation to refresh status, but the helper appends duplicate trend and decision entries instead of updating the existing plan record.
prevention_rule: Make verify:state complete-plan idempotent per phase-plan by replacing existing recent trend and decision entries for the same plan when rerun in one execution session.

title: Verification should compare source behavior against shipped bundle
root_cause: Focused verifier checks and source-imported tests can pass while the bundled bgsd-tools runtime remains stale or broken, leaving shipped validation behavior inconsistent with source evidence.
prevention_rule: For bundle-adjacent phases, always pair source-level proofs with a shipped-runtime command check (for example util:validate-commands or verifier helpers via bin/bgsd-tools.cjs) before declaring guidance or validation gaps closed.

title: Rebuild bundled runtime before shipped-surface re-verification
root_cause: Verification of shipped CLI behavior can stay red from stale bundled artifacts even after source-level fixes land, producing false remaining gaps until bin/plugin outputs are rebuilt.
prevention_rule: When a phase gap depends on bundled runtime behavior, require a fresh build of shipped artifacts before re-running verifier helpers or broad shipped-surface validation.

title: Retry plan verification once on internal verifier crashes
root_cause: The plan-structure verifier can intermittently crash with an internal cache warmup ReferenceError before returning a valid result, which is not a plan defect.
prevention_rule: When verify:verify plan-structure or analyze-plan fails with an internal tool exception, retry the same command once before surfacing a blocker so transient verifier faults do not create false plan failures.

title: verify:state complete-plan can leave stale phase summary fields
root_cause: The complete-plan helper advanced plan counters and current focus but left STATE.md summary fields like the active phase number and aggregate plan metrics stale, forcing manual repair during executor completion.
prevention_rule: After complete-plan updates, automatically re-read STATE.md and reconcile phase/current-plan/velocity summary fields against the active plan before reporting success.

title: Lock runtime guidance tests to full command shape
root_cause: Runtime guidance regression coverage for planning advisories asserted canonical command-family prefixes but not required operands, so bare /bgsd-plan roadmap add|remove|insert strings survived even after broader command-surface cleanup.
prevention_rule: When a runtime or plugin surface recommends a follow-up command, tests must assert the full runnable or explicitly reference-only syntax and, for generated artifacts, verify both source and built bundle text.

title: TDD validator commands should fail hard or work
root_cause: The executor TDD workflow instructs agents to use execute:tdd validate-red/green/refactor, but the command currently returns 'not yet implemented', forcing manual proof capture during plan execution.
prevention_rule: Keep executor skills and CLI surfaces in lockstep: either implement the advertised execute:tdd validators or make the workflow route to the supported proof path so TDD runs do not stall mid-plan.

title: Artifact verification helpers should fail gracefully when metadata context is unavailable
root_cause: The verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands throw ReferenceError: createPlanMetadataContext is not defined instead of returning a structured missing/inconclusive result, forcing manual verification and breaking verifier workflow.
prevention_rule: Add coverage for verifier helper command execution paths and ensure missing metadata-context dependencies return structured JSON errors rather than uncaught exceptions.

title: Implement execute:tdd proof validators before requiring them in executor TDD flow
root_cause: The executor workflow and TDD skill require execute:tdd validate-red/green/refactor, but the shipped CLI currently returns 'TDD command not yet implemented' for those subcommands.
prevention_rule: Either implement the validator subcommands with structured proof output or update executor/TDD guidance to use a supported proof-recording path until the CLI support ships.

title: Artifact verifier can crash on plan verification paths
root_cause: The  and  commands can call an undefined , causing a runtime crash instead of a structured verification result during execute-plan validation.
prevention_rule: Add an automated smoke test for  and  on a real PLAN.md fixture so missing helper wiring fails in CI before executors rely on the command.

title: Verifier helper regressions should trigger a required manual-fallback note
root_cause: The shipped verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands can crash with ReferenceError: createPlanMetadataContext is not defined, but verification workflows assume helper availability and only discover the breakage mid-run.
prevention_rule: When verifier-helper commands fail unexpectedly, require the verifier to record the exact helper failure and switch immediately to explicit manual artifact and wiring checks so evidence quality stays traceable.

title: Separate internal bootstrap routes from surfaced command-integrity failures
root_cause: The command-integrity validator currently reports internal bootstrap routes and markdown-decorated action text as surfaced command failures, which obscures true user-facing regressions and creates conflicting milestone verification evidence.
prevention_rule: Teach command validation to classify internal workflow/agent bootstrap commands and decorated UI action labels separately from runnable user guidance, and keep bundled-validator parity checks in the milestone smoke slice.

title: Plan approval should rely on verifier-backed must_haves validation
root_cause: Field-presence checks can pass plans whose verifier-facing must_haves metadata is malformed or inconclusive, causing approval before execution despite missing goal-backward wiring data.
prevention_rule: Before plan approval, require verify:verify plan-structure to succeed and treat malformed or inconclusive must_haves artifacts/key_links metadata as blockers instead of inferring readiness from raw frontmatter presence.

title: Prefer direct smoke checks when node:test files are oversized
root_cause: The execute-plan light verification path assumed  would behave like a narrow slice, but Node still loads and runs large multi-suite files, so unrelated legacy failures and long runtimes can drown the touched proof.
prevention_rule: When the touched assertions live inside oversized  files, attempt the declared broad gate once for baseline only, then switch immediately to rebuilt-runtime plus direct smoke scripts or dedicated small test files for the touched behavior instead of retrying the same filtered large-file command.

title: Artifact and key-link verifier should not crash when metadata context fallback is used
root_cause: The verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands still reference createPlanMetadataContext directly when Dn().getPlanMetadataContext is unavailable, causing a ReferenceError and forcing manual verification even when plan metadata exists.
prevention_rule: Ensure both verifier commands import or route through a single metadata-context factory before release, and add a CLI regression test that executes artifact/key-link verification against a real plan file under the shipped bundle.

title: Validate command-integrity negatives against routed command truth
root_cause: The surfaced command validator derives CLI inventory from documented help entries only, so routed commands that exist in the router but are absent from help metadata can be misreported as nonexistent.
prevention_rule: Before treating a validator 'nonexistent-command' result as authoritative, compare the claimed-missing command against routed command sources or a reconciled generated inventory, and keep proof validators sourced from runtime truth instead of a single secondary registry.

title: Implement or suppress TDD validation helper steps before TDD execution
root_cause: The TDD execution workflow instructs executors to run execute:tdd validate-red/green/refactor, but the command currently returns 'TDD command not yet implemented', forcing manual proof capture and risking inconsistent TDD summaries.
prevention_rule: Before routing a plan as type:tdd, either implement execute:tdd validation subcommands or update executor guidance to fall back explicitly to direct test-command proof capture.

title: Unify JJ commit hash semantics in execution workflows
root_cause: Executor-facing commit helpers return Git commit IDs while self-check guidance examples verify JJ change IDs, which makes successful task commits appear missing during summary self-checks.
prevention_rule: Use one documented hash type end-to-end for execute:commit output, summary templates, and self-check commands, or emit both explicitly with matching verification examples.

title: Verifier should fall back when helper commands crash
root_cause: Phase verification helper commands can fail in the bundled CLI even after a successful build, so a verifier that assumes helper availability can stall or over-trust missing evidence.
prevention_rule: When verify:verify artifacts or key-links crashes, record the helper failure explicitly and continue with manual source-level artifact/key-link proof instead of blocking verification.

title: Verifier metadata helpers must be smoke-tested after bundling
root_cause: The bundled verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands still reference createPlanMetadataContext even when that symbol is unavailable in the shipped runtime, so verification helpers can fail despite plan metadata being present.
prevention_rule: Add a bundled-runtime smoke test that runs verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links against a fixture plan during build/test so verifier helper regressions are caught before agents rely on them.

title: Keep TDD validation surfaces aligned with executor workflow
root_cause: The executor TDD workflow and skill required execute:tdd validate-red/green commands, but the CLI surface still returned 'TDD command not yet implemented', forcing manual proof collection during plan execution.
prevention_rule: Before routing plans to the TDD executor flow, add an automated contract check that the documented execute:tdd subcommands actually return structured proof instead of placeholder responses.

title: verify:state complete-plan must parse live STATE.md variants
root_cause: The complete-plan helper expected different Current Plan/Total Plans fields than the live STATE.md format using 'Plan: 02 of 02 in current phase', so executor metadata updates failed and required manual repair.
prevention_rule: Keep state mutators backward-compatible with all supported STATE.md position formats and add regression coverage against the current template before routing executor completion through complete-plan.

title: Verifier metadata helpers should fail closed, not crash
root_cause: The verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands reference an undefined createPlanMetadataContext fallback in the bundled runtime, so verification tooling throws before returning structured metadata status.
prevention_rule: Add an automated smoke test that runs both verifier metadata commands against a real plan file in the built runtime and require graceful missing/inconclusive responses instead of uncaught exceptions.

title: History digest can return empty data despite relevant phase summaries
root_cause: The planning workflow relies on util:history-digest for prior-phase selection, but in this run it returned an empty digest even though Phase 181 SUMMARY files existed and were relevant, forcing manual glob/read fallback.
prevention_rule: When util:history-digest returns no phases in a repo that clearly has phase summaries, planners should treat the digest as inconclusive and immediately fall back to direct summary discovery for the most recent dependency phases instead of assuming no history context exists.

title: Phase researcher prompts should not assume Write tool availability
root_cause: The phase-researcher instructions direct agents to prefer a Write tool for RESEARCH.md persistence, but the actual tool surface can omit Write and require apply_patch fallback, creating unnecessary uncertainty during output persistence.
prevention_rule: Align subagent prompt/tool declarations with the runtime tool contract, or explicitly state apply_patch as the default persistence path whenever Write is unavailable.

title: Guard cache warm diagnostics inside verifier CLI
root_cause: The first verifier run can execute cache-warm diagnostic code that references writeDebugDiagnostic even when that helper is unavailable in the current bundled runtime, causing an internal crash before plan results are returned.
prevention_rule: Cache warm or debug-diagnostic paths in shipped CLI commands must degrade to a no-op when optional helpers are absent, and verifier cold-start smoke coverage should exercise the first-run cache warm path before release.

title: Warm plan-structure verifier before parallel fan-out
root_cause: Cold verifier startup can make the first parallel plan-structure/analyze batch less reliable, especially when multiple plan verifiers hit shared caches at once.
prevention_rule: Run one serial verify:verify plan-structure call before parallel verifier fan-out, then retry each verifier command once on transient failure.

title: Executor TDD validation commands should fail closed when unimplemented
root_cause: The executor workflow requires execute:tdd validate-red/green/refactor, but the command currently returns a placeholder response instead of structured proof or a hard error, so TDD runs have to fall back to manual evidence collection.
prevention_rule: Implement the execute:tdd validators or make them exit non-zero with explicit unsupported guidance so executor plans can branch deterministically instead of discovering the gap mid-run.

title: Stubbed TDD validators force executors to bypass structured proof
root_cause: The executor workflow and TDD skill require execute:tdd validate-red/green/refactor, but the shipped command still returns a placeholder message instead of structured validation output.
prevention_rule: Do not ship executor-facing validation routes as placeholders; add a release gate that fails when documented CLI proof commands return stub responses.

title: Verifier should fall back when must-have helpers crash
root_cause: The artifact/key-link verification CLI crashed with ReferenceError:createPlanMetadataContext, which can block standard verification flow even when plan metadata is present.
prevention_rule: When verify helper commands crash, verifiers should immediately switch to manual must-have verification and record the helper failure as tooling evidence instead of stalling or treating the phase as unverifiable.

title: Force Map cache when plan verifiers hit writeDebugDiagnostic crash
root_cause: The bundled verifier path can crash on a cold cache because the cache warmup branch references writeDebugDiagnostic, which is undefined in this runtime.
prevention_rule: If verify:verify plan-structure or analyze-plan crashes in this codepath, retry once with GSD_CACHE_FORCE_MAP=1 so planning can complete while the cache bug is fixed.

title: Keep verify:state complete-plan aligned with current STATE.md headings
root_cause: The completion helper still expects legacy 'Current Plan'/'Total Plans in Phase' markers, but the active STATE.md format now uses condensed 'Plan: NN of MM in current phase' lines.
prevention_rule: Add a regression covering the current STATE.md shape and teach verify:state complete-plan to parse both canonical condensed and legacy position formats before relying on it in execute-plan.

title: Repair legacy STATE.md formats before complete-plan writes
root_cause: The executor called verify:state complete-plan against a project STATE.md that still used legacy Phase/Plan/Status line formatting, so the helper could not parse Current Plan and Total Plans and failed mid-finalization.
prevention_rule: Before invoking verify:state complete-plan, detect legacy STATE.md current-position formats and normalize or repair them so canonical state-update helpers receive parseable fields.

title: State validation should catch complete-plan parser mismatches
root_cause: verify:state validate accepted a non-canonical STATE.md current-position shape that verify:state complete-plan could not parse, so execution hit a late metadata failure despite a clean validation result.
prevention_rule: Make verify:state validate enforce the exact Current Plan and Total Plans in Phase fields required by complete-plan, or have complete-plan reuse the same tolerant parser as validation.

title: Artifact verifier should fail closed without crashing
root_cause: The verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands reference createPlanMetadataContext even when it is undefined in the built runtime, causing a ReferenceError instead of a structured verifier status.
prevention_rule: Bundle and smoke-test verifier helper commands in build validation so missing metadata helpers surface as structured invalid results rather than runtime crashes.

title: Planner template should include verification_route in plan frontmatter example
root_cause: The phase-planning template example omitted verification_route even though plan-structure validation now treats it as required metadata, so an approval-ready plan can fail on the first verifier pass.
prevention_rule: Keep the planner's canonical PLAN.md frontmatter example and checklist in sync with verifier-required fields, especially verification_route, before prompting agents to draft plans.

title: Cold-cache warmup must share verifier process
root_cause: The plan-checker workflow warmed plan-structure in one process, then fanned out new verifier processes in parallel. Because cache state was process-local, a parallel plan-structure call still hit the cold-cache path and crashed on an internal undefined diagnostic helper.
prevention_rule: When a verifier has a cold-cache bootstrap bug, warm and fan out within the same long-lived process or treat the first invocation of each fresh process as crash-prone and serialize/retry accordingly.

title: Use data URL imports for source-only ESM module tests in CJS harnesses
root_cause: A new CommonJS node:test file tried to import an unbundled ESM source file directly, so Node parsed the .js file as CJS before the contract tests could run.
prevention_rule: When a new CJS test targets repo source that is ESM and has no relative imports, load the file contents and import them through a data: URL instead of relying on direct path import semantics.

title: Verification helpers should fail gracefully when plan metadata context is unavailable
root_cause: The verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands crashed with a ReferenceError for createPlanMetadataContext instead of returning a structured missing/inconclusive result, forcing manual verification and reducing trust in verifier automation.
prevention_rule: Guard helper initialization so missing plan-metadata context resolves to a structured error payload, and add a regression test that the verifier commands never throw raw ReferenceError exceptions on valid plan inputs.

title: Implement TDD validator commands before requiring them in executor workflows
root_cause: The executor workflow and TDD skill require execute:tdd validate-red/green/refactor, but the repo-local CLI currently returns 'TDD command not yet implemented', forcing executors to improvise proof capture during otherwise standard TDD runs.
prevention_rule: Either ship the execute:tdd validator subcommands before workflows mandate them, or add a documented fallback proof path in the workflow so RED/GREEN/REFACTOR runs stay deterministic when validator support is absent.

title: Skip generated runtime commits when rebuilds include unrelated dirty-source output
root_cause: The execution workflow requires rebuilt runtime verification, but in a dirty checkout npm run build regenerates plugin.js from all currently modified sources, not just the active plan slice, so blindly committing the bundle would break atomic task isolation.
prevention_rule: When a plan needs rebuilt-runtime proof in a dirty repo, rebuild and rerun focused tests for verification, but commit generated artifacts only if their source diff is isolated to the active plan files; otherwise document the verification-only rebuild in the summary.

title: Artifact verifier should not crash when plan metadata context fallback is needed
root_cause: The verify:verify artifacts and verify:verify key-links commands reference createPlanMetadataContext when Ln().getPlanMetadataContext is unavailable, but that fallback symbol is undefined in the bundled CLI, causing verifier workflows to crash instead of returning missing/inconclusive metadata states.
prevention_rule: Bundle a tested plan-metadata-context fallback or fail with a structured verifier result; add a CLI regression test that runs both verify subcommands against a plan when the helper path is unavailable.

title: Prefer plan-level quality checks before full-phase validator sweeps
root_cause: Running verify:quality across whole active phases during milestone verification can hang long enough to hide useful signal, while the same validator on individual touched plans returns actionable results quickly.
prevention_rule: During milestone or cross-phase verification, start with plan-level quality checks for touched plans and only escalate to phase-wide validator sweeps after focused smoke proof is stable; if a phase-wide sweep times out once, record it as baseline/tooling debt and switch to focused plan checks.

title: Gap-closure research should rerun cited blocker proof before planning
root_cause: Gap-closure planning can overfit prior summaries or audits when the real blocker is a smaller live delta, such as one exact workflow wording regression plus missing formal verification evidence.
prevention_rule: When a milestone audit or verification report names concrete failing commands, phase research should rerun the smallest cited proof early and plan from the current result instead of assuming the whole prior implementation slice needs rework.

title: Prefer simple rg verify commands in plans
root_cause: Plan realism analysis treated regex-heavy rg <verify> expressions with escapes and alternation as unavailable validation steps, even though the intent was a normal file-content check.
prevention_rule: When authoring PLAN.md task verification commands, prefer simple file-targeted rg patterns or direct test commands over complex escaped alternations so analyze-plan can reliably interpret the step.

title: Warm verifier cache before parallel plan checks
root_cause: The plan verifier helpers can be cold-start fragile during parallel fan-out, causing avoidable transient internal crashes unless one serial verification primes shared state first.
prevention_rule: When approval requires multiple plan-structure and analyze-plan runs, execute one serial plan-structure warm-up before parallel fan-out and retry each verifier once on transient internal crash signatures.

title: Prefer file-path-backed verify commands in PLAN.md tasks
root_cause: Revision-mode plans used regex-heavy rg patterns and inline scripts for task <verify> checks. The analyze-plan gate interpreted those payloads as unavailable paths, creating approval friction even when the intent was sound.
prevention_rule: When revising PLAN.md verification steps, prefer repo-native verifier commands or fixed-string/file-path-backed checks over regex alternation and inline scripting so analyze-plan can validate the proof path cleanly.

title: Verifier metadata helpers should fail soft instead of throwing
root_cause: The installed verify:verify artifacts/key-links commands still reference createPlanMetadataContext on a crash path, so verification helpers throw a ReferenceError instead of returning structured missing/inconclusive metadata.
prevention_rule: Add regression coverage that exercises verify:verify artifacts/key-links against real plan metadata and require the commands to return structured failure statuses rather than uncaught exceptions.

title: Milestone audits should explicitly probe shipped verifier helpers
root_cause: Verification artifacts claimed helper-command limitations in markdown, but the audit workflow did not require a live probe of shipped helper commands, so acceptance confidence could depend on stale narrative instead of current runtime behavior.
prevention_rule: During milestone or phase audits, run at least one real shipped-runtime invocation of each verifier helper surfaced as a dependency or limitation and record the live result alongside source/test evidence.

title: Roadmap plan counts must match on-disk plan files
root_cause: Roadmap creation instructions encouraged numeric plan counts before any phase plans existed, but verify:state validate treats roadmap plan counts as disk-truth claims and fails when no PLAN.md files exist.
prevention_rule: During roadmap creation before phase planning, either keep phase plan counts at 0 and create phase directories only, or generate real plan files before claiming non-zero counts in ROADMAP.md and STATE.md.

title: Derive missing phase directories immediately
root_cause: Phase research spent time globbing for a phase-specific directory that the init contract had already shown was missing.
prevention_rule: When init returns phase_dir null, derive the canonical .planning/phases/<padded>-<slug> path immediately and create it instead of searching for an existing directory.
